{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Dragon's breath
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dragon's breath]] was used in an attack against the woman.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dragon's breath]] slammed into [[Malice]]'s armor.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
